vBRIEFInfo.author: panopticon-cli/0.0.0
vBRIEFInfo.description: Plan for PAN-1148: Unified dashboard redesign — Pipeline, Board, Command Deck, Agents, and shared Issue Detail drawer

plan.title: Unified dashboard redesign — Pipeline, Board, Command Deck, Agents, and shared Issue Detail drawer
plan.author: agent:claude-opus-4-7

narratives.Problem: The dashboard has accreted six operationally distinct destinations (Command Deck, Board, Awaiting Merge, Agents, Activity, God View), each with its own vocabulary, card shape, color usage, and mental model. The surfaces tell the same story in different dialects — an issue 'in review' on Board, a Deacon-tracked review specialist on Agents, and a READY TO MERGE row on Awaiting Merge are the same state expressed three ways. Operators mentally translate between dialects; every redesign is a per-surface effort.
narratives.Proposal: Collapse six destinations into four operations lenses (Pipeline, Board, Command Deck, Agents) plus a single shared Issue Detail drawer. Build three primitives once — Issue Row, Issue Card, Agent Card — and compose them everywhere. The drawer is the single deep-dive surface, opened from any row/card on any lens, URL-addressable via ?issue=<id>. Pipeline becomes the new default landing. Awaiting Merge retires; READY TO MERGE becomes a verb badge. Implementation sequencing: primitives → drawer → Pipeline → Board redesign → Command Deck refresh → Agents wholesale replacement → Awaiting Merge retirement. The 7-step sequence is implementation order, not phased releases — every bead in this plan must ship before pan done.

autoDecisions.rationale: PRD §6 step 1 allows either packages/contracts (if shared with desktop) or the frontend co-location. Desktop sharing is not in scope; co-locating with the only consumer avoids packaging churn and a contract re-publish cycle.

autoDecisions.summary: Drawer state lives on the existing Zustand store as a new slice, not a new store.
autoDecisions.rationale: Drawer reacts to existing domain events (review status, agents, beads). A separate store would require cross-store synchronization. PRD §4.3 explicitly says 'owned by a single global store slice'.

autoDecisions.summary: Drawer addressing: ?issue=<id>&tab=<tab> layered on the existing tab/path routing, not nested routes.
autoDecisions.rationale: PRD §4.6 + §5.3 specify the query-string contract. Query-string layering preserves parent surface state (scroll, selection) so closing the drawer feels like dismissing an overlay, not navigating back.

autoDecisions.summary: Default route flip: '/' → Pipeline. '/board' is added as the explicit Board route. Sidebar logo click goes to Pipeline.
autoDecisions.rationale: PRD §5.3 routes table. Sidebar.tsx logo handler currently targets 'kanban' (the Board tab) — must be retargeted.

autoDecisions.summary: Sidebar Operations group order: Pipeline, Board, Command Deck, Agents. Awaiting Merge entry removed. AutoPreso preserved.
autoDecisions.rationale: PRD §4.1 IA diagram. Pipeline first as new default landing. AutoPreso is unrelated to this initiative and is not flagged for removal.

autoDecisions.summary: InspectorPanel retirement is gated by a separate written parity-audit bead. No pre-emptive deletion.
autoDecisions.rationale: PRD §7 risk row 5 mandates an audit. InspectorPanel.tsx is 1387 LOC referenced from KanbanBoard, BulkActionBar, AwaitingMergePage.

autoDecisions.summary: Board card swap is a swap, not a rewrite. KanbanBoard.tsx (4268 LOC) retains drag-to-reorder, filters, bulk actions, counters; only the card render call and drag-to-phase wiring change.
autoDecisions.rationale: PRD §6 step 4. Limits diff scope; protects against regressing the surrounding kanban machinery.

autoDecisions.summary: Command Deck right pane reframe reuses existing ZoneCOverviewTabs content components verbatim (OverviewTab, BeadsTab, VBriefTab, ActivityTab, DiscussionsTab, CostsTab, PrDiffTab, MarkdownTab). Only the host shell changes.
autoDecisions.rationale: PRD §6 step 5 explicitly forbids rewriting conversation rendering. The tabs are already partitioned; the work is a shell reframe.

autoDecisions.summary: Verb badge and other foundation primitives do NOT require inspection. requiresInspection=true only for drawer-shell-and-store and drawer-subscription-contract.
autoDecisions.rationale: Per the planning template's inspection criteria, mechanical primitives with a fully spec'd contract (PRD §4.4 table) plus TS union type enforcement do not earn inspection cost. Inspection is reserved for judgment-call architectural decisions.

autoDecisions.summary: Drawer data subscriptions filter at the server side by issueId. Drawer client owns a single Effect-managed subscription torn down on close.
autoDecisions.rationale: PRD §5.2: 'server-side filtering by issue id, not new transports.' Client-side filtering of the full domain-event stream would scale poorly with concurrent issues.

autoDecisions.summary: Styleguide-conformance Playwright test asserts the same primitive class signatures (data-component attributes) appear on Pipeline, Board, Command Deck, Agents. Excludes /god-view.
autoDecisions.rationale: PRD §8 success metric. Implementation: each primitive tagged with data-component=verb-badge|issue-row|issue-card|agent-card. GodView retains scoped tokens by design (PRD §3 non-goal).

autoDecisions.summary: ⌘K command palette result click opens the drawer (?issue=<id>) instead of navigating to a route. CommandPalette.tsx onSelect handler is rewired.
autoDecisions.rationale: PRD §4.6 lists ⌘K as a drawer entry surface alongside Pipeline rows, Board cards, Command Deck rows, and Agents cards.

autoDecisions.summary: Deacon status UI moves from Agents view to Health page. The DeaconStatus component is relocated, not duplicated; AgentList.tsx's Deacon section is removed.
autoDecisions.rationale: PRD §4.1 'What's preserved'. CloisterStatusBar (sidebar) is a separate surface and is unchanged by this initiative.

autoDecisions.summary: Where the PRD and the mock HTML disagree, mock wins for visual layout, PRD wins for behavior and data contracts.
autoDecisions.rationale: PRD §4.2 establishes this precedence rule. Encoded in plan so the work agent does not need to re-derive it.

autoDecisions.summary: Two-step retirement for /awaiting-merge: redirect bead first, file-deletion bead second.
autoDecisions.rationale: Protects user muscle memory (PRD §7 risk row 3) and keeps the rollback surface small — a Pipeline regression can be reverted without restoring the AwaitingMerge component.

autoDecisions.summary: PR #1160 (reconcileClosedPrReadyForMerge patrol) is treated as an external prerequisite. If not merged when this work starts, board-card-swap bead's STUCK badge AC includes inline reconciliation as a fallback (per eltmon's 2026-05-17 issue comment).
autoDecisions.rationale: The issue comment explicitly flags this dependency. Inline duplication is the cleanest fallback that does not block this initiative on an out-of-band PR.

items.title: Add VerbBadge primitive component (10 variants, optional pulse)

narrative.Action: Create src/dashboard/frontend/src/components/primitives/VerbBadge.tsx exporting a single component with a TypeScript discriminated-union variant prop. Implement the 10 variants exactly per PRD §4.7.7 (WORK RUNNING, REVIEW RUNNING, SHIP RUNNING, PLANNING, INPUT, READY TO MERGE, MERGED, CHANGES REQUESTED, STUCK · Nh, QUEUED FOR PLAN). Pulse dot animation only on non-terminal states. Universal style: 10px DM Sans weight 500, letter-spacing 0.05em, uppercase, padding 2px 6px, radius var(--radius-sm). Tag the root element with data-component="verb-badge" for styleguide-conformance test.

subItems.title: VerbBadge.tsx exports default component with strict union variant prop covering all 10 PRD §4.7.7 verbs and rejects unknown variants at type level
Each variant uses the correct color tokens per PRD §4.7.7 table (info/8% bg + info/32% border + --info-foreground for WORK RUNNING, etc.); no hardcoded colors

Pulse dot animation (1.6s ease-out infinite) renders for WORK RUNNING, REVIEW RUNNING, SHIP RUNNING, PLANNING, INPUT only; never for MERGED, READY TO MERGE, CHANGES REQUESTED, STUCK · Nh, QUEUED FOR PLAN
STUCK · Nh variant accepts an `hours` numeric prop and renders `STUCK · ${hours}h` in the label
Storybook-style demo route or vitest snapshot covers all 10 variants visually
Root element carries `data-component="verb-badge"` and a `data-variant` matching the variant prop

items.title: Add PhaseGlyph primitive (5 SVG glyphs for todo/work/review/ship/done)

narrative.Action: Create src/dashboard/frontend/src/components/primitives/PhaseGlyph.tsx — 14×14 SVG component with `phase` prop mapping to the phase color tokens (--muted-foreground for todo, --info-foreground for work, --warning-foreground for review, --signal-review-foreground for ship/plan, --success-foreground for done). Use existing classifier in src/dashboard/frontend/src/lib/pipeline-state.ts to derive phase from issue/agent state.

subItems.title: PhaseGlyph.tsx renders 14×14 SVG with stroke=currentColor for all 5 phases
Phase color matches the matching phase-foreground token; no hardcoded colors
Each glyph carries `data-phase` attribute matching the phase prop for stylegide-conformance and tests

items.title: Add PhaseHeader primitive (sticky group header for Pipeline / Command Deck)

narrative.Action: Create src/dashboard/frontend/src/components/primitives/PhaseHeader.tsx implementing PRD §4.7.4 exactly: sticky top:0 z-index:2, 2px top border colored per phase, 1px bottom border, blur(6px) backdrop, 8×8 phase dot, 14px DM Sans title, count chip, optional sub-line, right-meta slot. Composes PhaseGlyph. Variants `variant="pipeline"` and `variant="command-deck"` adjust padding per the spec table.

subItems.title: PhaseHeader.tsx implements all five phases (Ship, Review, Work, Plan, Todo) with correct top-border colors per PRD §4.7.4
Header is sticky and remains legible when rows scroll under it (verified by browser smoke test or vitest assertion of style)
Count chip and optional sub-line render correctly; right-meta slot accepts arbitrary ReactNode

items.title: Add MetricTile + MetricStrip primitive (uniform tile for Pipeline / Agents / Command Deck strips)

narrative.Action: Create src/dashboard/frontend/src/components/primitives/MetricTile.tsx and MetricStrip.tsx implementing PRD §4.7.3. Tile: card surface, 18px radius, 14×14 eyebrow icon carrying the metric's signal token, 22px (Pipeline) / 20px (Agents) value with tabular-nums, 11px sub line, optional delta. Strip: CSS grid `repeat(N, 1fr)` with gap 12px, configurable column count. NUMBER always stays --foreground; only the icon carries signal color.

subItems.title: MetricTile accepts {eyebrow, value, sub?, delta?, icon, signal} props and renders per PRD §4.7.3 spec
Number value stays --foreground in all signal variants (rule: only icon carries signal color)
MetricStrip composes N tiles in CSS grid; column count is a prop (5 for Pipeline, 6 for Agents)
Delta variant renders positive (cost down) as success-foreground green, negative as destructive-foreground red

items.title: Add IssueRow primitive (Pipeline / Command Deck row, composes VerbBadge + PhaseGlyph)

narrative.Action: Create src/dashboard/frontend/src/components/primitives/IssueRow.tsx implementing PRD §4.7.5 (grid `14px 78px 14px 1fr 220px 84px 30px` for Pipeline; tighter avatar column for Command Deck). Priority left border via ::before pseudo (urgent=destructive, high=warning, medium=22% white, low=transparent). Ledger cell stacks runtime over cost with cost ALWAYS in --signal-cost-foreground (cyan) regardless of context — the explicit PRD §4.5 exception to one-signal-per-element. Tag root with `data-component="issue-row"`. Empty-state ledger renders `—` at 55% opacity. variant="pipeline"|"command-deck" toggles minor sizing per the spec table.

subItems.title: IssueRow grid layout matches PRD §4.7.5 exactly for both pipeline and command-deck variants
Priority left border uses ::before pseudo with the correct color per priority level; no inline color hacks
Composes VerbBadge for the one colored badge slot; composes PhaseGlyph for the phase column
Ledger cell renders runtime in muted, cost in --signal-cost-foreground; empty state renders `—` at 55% opacity
Label chips use bg-muted + muted-foreground; never status-colored (PRD §4.5 'labels are taxonomy, never status')
Avatar gradient renders one of 5 deterministic tones based on assignee name hash
Root element carries `data-component="issue-row"` for styleguide-conformance test
Click handler accepts an issueId-based onOpen callback; component itself does not own routing

items.title: Add IssueCard primitive (Board card, composes VerbBadge)

metadata.statusReason: Swarm slot 1 merged into feature branch

narrative.Action: Create src/dashboard/frontend/src/components/primitives/IssueCard.tsx implementing PRD §4.7.6 exactly: 14px radius, padding 12px 12px 10px, lighter card surface (color-mix background 92% + white), priority left border identical to IssueRow, stuck/merge-ready border color overrides, project mark + ID + verb badge in row 1, 2-line clamped title, label chips, bead progress bar with phase-colored fill, footer with agent meta + runtime + 18px avatar. Tag root with `data-component="issue-card"`.

subItems.title: IssueCard implements all PRD §4.7.6 spec values (radius, padding, surface, hover, priority bar inset 12px)
Stuck card and merge-ready card border colors swap correctly when corresponding props are true
Bead progress bar renders the correct fill width and phase-colored fill
Composes VerbBadge; never renders status colors on labels
Root element carries `data-component="issue-card"`

items.title: Add AgentCard primitive (Agents fleet card, composes VerbBadge)

metadata.statusReason: Swarm slot 2 merged into feature branch

narrative.Action: Create src/dashboard/frontend/src/components/primitives/AgentCard.tsx implementing PRD §4.7.9 exactly: card surface with 18px radius, 3px ::before left accent per phase, stuck border override, name + verb badge + menu button row, issue panel with project mark + ID/title (2-line clamp), tri-column meta (lbl/val pairs), stream excerpt with fade-out gradient and 84px max-height, optional stuck banner, footer with primary/danger action links. Tag root with `data-component="agent-card"`.

subItems.title: AgentCard implements PRD §4.7.9 spec (grid container, accent rail, stuck override)
Stream excerpt has the fade-out gradient via ::after at 24px tall
Stuck banner renders inline when `stuck` prop is true; never shown otherwise
Footer action links: primary uses --info-foreground, danger uses --destructive-foreground (right-aligned)
Root element carries `data-component="agent-card"`

items.title: Add fractal-noise body overlay + shared top-bar styles for new chrome

narrative.Action: PRD §4.7 'Universal rules' calls for a 3.5%-opacity fractal-noise body overlay (fixed-position SVG turbulence at 256px tile) on every page. Add it as a global element rendered once in App.tsx (or main shell). Also extract the shared top-bar style helpers per PRD §4.7.2 (52px/48px height, 13px breadcrumb, 32px search/buttons, segmented control) into src/dashboard/frontend/src/components/primitives/TopBar.tsx for reuse by Pipeline, Board, Agents.

subItems.title: Fractal-noise overlay renders fixed-position at 3.5% opacity, 256px tile; does not capture pointer events
TopBar primitive supports {height, breadcrumb, meta, search, segmentedControl, actions} slots per PRD §4.7.2
Primary button uses --primary background with inset white 6% highlight; ghost button uses transparent + --input border

items.title: Add Issue Detail drawer shell + global store slice (single-instance, URL-addressable)

narrative.Action: Create src/dashboard/frontend/src/components/drawer/IssueDrawer.tsx as the slide-out shell (980px max-width, full-height pinned right, scrim with backdrop-blur(2px), shadow per PRD §4.7.8). Add `drawer` slice to the existing Zustand store (src/dashboard/frontend/src/lib/store.ts) with shape `{ issueId: string | null, tab: string }` and actions `openIssue(id, tab?)`, `closeIssue()`. Wire URL sync: `?issue=<id>&tab=<tab>` is the authoritative state — opening reflects to URL, closing removes both params, opening a different issue REPLACES the prior one (sequential, never stacked). Esc, X button, click-on-scrim all close. Parent surface dims (4% accent overlay + 2px blur) behind. Inspect: ensure the single-instance invariant is enforced at the store level (opening B while A is open is a replace, not a stack); ensure subscription teardown happens on close (no leaks on rapid open→close→open burst).

subItems.title: IssueDrawer.tsx implements PRD §4.7.8 surface spec: 980px max-width, max-width: calc(100vw - 48px), full-height pinned right, backdrop-filter blur(2px), shadow -24px 0 64px rgb(0 0 0 / 40%)
Zustand store has new `drawer` slice with `{ issueId: string | null, tab: string }` and actions `openIssue(id, tab?)`, `closeIssue()`; opening a new issue while one is open REPLACES (not stacks)
URL sync: opening sets `?issue=<id>&tab=<tab>` via history.replaceState; closing removes both params; initial page load with `?issue=<id>` opens drawer on mount
Esc, X button, and click-on-scrim all dispatch closeIssue()
Parent surface receives a `data-drawer-open="true"` attribute and applies 4% accent overlay + 2px blur via CSS — no inline style mutation
Animation: drawer slide-in 200ms ease-in-out (scale 0.98 → 1, opacity 0 → 1) per PRD §4.7.11
Vitest integration test asserts the single-instance invariant: openIssue('A'), openIssue('B'), then store reads { issueId: 'B' } (not stacked)
Vitest integration test for rapid open→close→open burst (50 iterations) confirms no orphan listeners or subscriptions in the store
Closing the drawer restores parent surface scroll position (drawer is overlay, not navigation)

items.title: Define and implement drawer subscription contract (Effect-managed, server-filtered by issueId)

narrative.Action: Create src/dashboard/frontend/src/components/drawer/useDrawerData.ts implementing the single Effect-managed subscription that the drawer owns and tears down on close. Per PRD §5.2, subscription filters at SERVER side by issueId — extend the WS-RPC contract in src/dashboard/server/ws-rpc.ts (PanRpcGroup) with `subscribeIssueEvents(issueId)` returning a filtered stream of pipeline-state transitions, bead closures, agent state changes for that one issue. The hook exposes `{ issue, agents, beads, reviewSpecialists, verificationGates, activityRail }` as reactive selectors. Inspect: ensure the server-side filter is enforced (not relying on client-side filter of full feed); ensure teardown on close releases the server-side subscription; ensure the hook is the ONLY data path for the drawer's data — no per-subsection ad-hoc fetches that drift from this contract.

subItems.title: WS-RPC contract gains `subscribeIssueEvents(issueId)` server-filtered stream in src/dashboard/server/ws-rpc.ts
useDrawerData hook returns `{ issue, agents, beads, reviewSpecialists, verificationGates, activityRail }` as reactive selectors keyed off the open issue id
Subscription is initiated on drawer open, torn down on drawer close (verified by network panel inspection / vitest with WS mock)
All drawer subsection components (active agent, beads, specialists, side rail) consume useDrawerData ONLY — no direct fetches or per-section subscriptions
Server-side filter implemented in src/dashboard/server/ws-rpc.ts; client never receives events for other issues over this stream (vitest with mock server)
Re-opening the drawer for the same issue id within 1 second reuses the existing subscription (no spurious tear-down + re-subscribe)

items.title: Add drawer Phase Timeline component (6-step header strip)

narrative.Action: Create src/dashboard/frontend/src/components/drawer/PhaseTimeline.tsx implementing PRD §4.7.8 'Phase timeline' grid `repeat(6, 1fr)`. 6 steps: Triaged, Planned, Implemented, Reviewed, Shipping, Merged. Each step has 2px top accent (transparent → success once done; signal-review for current). Per step: 10px uppercase lbl over 11px mono when-stamp over 10px sub. The current step's when-stamp goes foreground weight 500.

subItems.title: Renders all 6 steps with correct top-accent colors per state (done/current/upcoming)
Reads phase data from useDrawerData (not its own fetch)
when-stamps render in muted, except current step which goes foreground weight 500

items.title: Add drawer Tabs component (Overview / Plan / Beads / Conversation / Terminal / Activity / Files)

narrative.Action: Create src/dashboard/frontend/src/components/drawer/DrawerTabs.tsx implementing PRD §4.7.8 tabs. Padding 10px 14px, 13px DM Sans weight 500, color muted (hover/active foreground). Active tab gets 2px var(--primary) underline inset 14px from each side. Count chips are 10px SF Mono in 5px-padded accent pill. Tab state syncs to URL `?tab=<tab>`. Wire each tab to its content section (Overview composes the active-agent card, verification gates, beads list, review specialists; other tabs are placeholders that other beads fill).

subItems.title: Tabs render with correct active/hover/muted styling per PRD §4.7.8
Active tab syncs to `?tab=<tab>` URL parameter via drawer store action
Count chips on tabs with collections (Beads N/M) read counts from useDrawerData
Initial tab on drawer open is `overview` unless `?tab=` specifies otherwise

items.title: Add drawer Active Agent card (in-drawer agent panel with stream + Tell input)

narrative.Action: Create src/dashboard/frontend/src/components/drawer/DrawerActiveAgent.tsx implementing PRD §4.7.8 'Active-agent card': 3px signal-review left accent, name + verb badge + right-meta row, stream excerpt in dark panel with 180px max-height scroll, Tell input row (32px input + 32px primary Send button). Composes VerbBadge. Reads agent state from useDrawerData. Tell input POSTs to existing /api/agents/:id/tell endpoint.

subItems.title: Renders agent name (SF Mono 13px), verb badge (9px small variant), right-aligned meta (model · runtime · spend)
Stream excerpt panel implements PRD §4.7.8 spec: rgb(0 0 0 / 32%) bg, border, 11px SF Mono, 180px max-height scroll
Tell input + Send button POST to /api/agents/:id/tell on submit; UI clears after success
Empty state (no active agent) renders muted placeholder without errors

items.title: Add drawer Verification Gates grid (typecheck / lint / test / UAT)

narrative.Action: Create src/dashboard/frontend/src/components/drawer/DrawerVerificationGates.tsx implementing PRD §4.7.8 'Verification gates': grid `repeat(4, 1fr)` gap 8px, each gate card surface padding 10px 12px. Pass borders use color-mix(success / 32%), fail use color-mix(destructive / 32%). Value 14px weight 500 in matching *-foreground token. Sub 10px mono muted.

subItems.title: Renders 4 gates: typecheck, lint, test, UAT in a 4-column grid
Pass / fail border colors match PRD §4.7.8 color-mix tokens
Reads gate state from useDrawerData; updates reactively when gate results change

items.title: Add drawer Beads List (closed list with mono IDs, durations, done/current animation)

narrative.Action: Create src/dashboard/frontend/src/components/drawer/DrawerBeadsList.tsx implementing PRD §4.7.8 'Beads list': single card surface with overflow hidden, rows grid `18px 1fr auto auto`. Done check: filled success + white checkmark 9px. Current check: filled info + animated 1.5px ring `ping 1.6s ease-out infinite`. Done titles get line-through at 18% white. ID column SF Mono 10px muted. Duration SF Mono 10px muted tabular. Reads beads from useDrawerData.

subItems.title: Renders beads list with correct done/current visual states per PRD §4.7.8
Current bead has animated ping ring (scale 1 → 1.5, opacity 1 → 0)
Done bead titles render with text-decoration: line-through at 18% white
Reads beads from useDrawerData (not a separate fetch)

items.title: Add drawer Review Specialists list (4 verdict rows)

narrative.Action: Create src/dashboard/frontend/src/components/drawer/DrawerReviewSpecialists.tsx implementing PRD §4.7.8 'Review specialists list': card surface with rows grid `14px 1fr auto auto`, 8×8 status dot (run/idle/done/fail) + SF Mono 11px name + 10px meta + 10px duration. Renders the four review sub-roles (review.security, review.correctness, review.performance, review.requirements). Reads from useDrawerData.

subItems.title: Renders 4 review specialist rows with correct status dot colors (run=info, idle=muted, done=success, fail=destructive)
Reads from useDrawerData; updates reactively as convoy specialists progress

items.title: Add drawer Live Activity right rail (320px column with stream items)

narrative.Action: Create src/dashboard/frontend/src/components/drawer/DrawerActivityRail.tsx implementing PRD §4.7.8 'Side rail (live activity)'. 320px wide column, border-left, slightly lighter background. Stream items grid `14px 1fr` gap 10px, 8×8 status dot (work/review/ship/done/info) + 12px text foreground with 10px mono muted 'when' line below. Wraps drawer body in a `1fr 320px` grid. Reads activity from useDrawerData (already issue-filtered by the subscription).

subItems.title: Renders side rail at 320px width with correct border + background per PRD §4.7.8
Stream items render most-recent-first; auto-scrolls to top on new item arrival
Status dot colors match phase per PRD §4.7.8

items.title: Add drawer Action Bar (Reset · Stop · View PR · Merge to main)

narrative.Action: Create src/dashboard/frontend/src/components/drawer/DrawerActionBar.tsx implementing PRD §4.7.8 'Action bar': padding 12px 22px, 1px top border, lighter background. Ghost buttons left (Reset, Stop agent), spacer, ghost 'View PR' + primary 'Merge to main' (primary uses --success bg with #000 text for contrast). Wires Reset to existing /api/issues/:id/reset, Stop to /api/agents/:id/stop, View PR to issue.url field, Merge to /api/issues/:id/merge. Merge button disabled unless reviewStatus.readyForMerge && !merged.

subItems.title: Action bar renders with PRD §4.7.8 layout and color spec (Ghost left, primary green Merge right)
Reset wires to /api/issues/:id/reset with confirmation dialog (reuse useConfirm from DialogProvider)
Stop agent wires to /api/agents/:id/stop with confirmation
Merge button disabled unless readyForMerge=true && mergeStatus!=merged; click POSTs to /api/issues/:id/merge
View PR opens issue.url or workspace.mrUrl in new tab when present, hidden when both absent

items.title: Add Pipeline page shell + route (greenfield)

narrative.Action: Create src/dashboard/frontend/src/components/Pipeline/PipelineView.tsx as the new Pipeline route content. Composes TopBar (52px), MetricStrip (5 tiles — wired in p2), grouped IssueRow lists under PhaseHeader (wired in p3), and a footer-empty zone. Imports the Issue Row primitive from f5. Reads issues from selectIssues + reviewStatusByIssueId from the existing dashboard store and classifies by lifecycle phase using src/dashboard/frontend/src/lib/pipeline-state.ts. Add `pipeline` to Tab type in Header.tsx; add `TAB_PATHS['pipeline'] = '/pipeline'` in App.tsx. (Default-route flip ships in n2.)

subItems.title: PipelineView.tsx renders at /pipeline route via App.tsx routing
Composes TopBar primitive at 52px height with title 'Pipeline'
Reads issues + reviewStatusByIssueId from existing Zustand store; no new endpoints
Phase classification uses src/dashboard/frontend/src/lib/pipeline-state.ts helpers (no duplicate logic)
Tab type in Header.tsx includes 'pipeline'; TAB_PATHS contains '/pipeline'; PATH_TO_TAB resolves '/pipeline' → 'pipeline'
Sidebar.tsx has a Pipeline nav entry above Board in the Operations group

items.title: Wire Pipeline 5-tile metric strip (Active issues / Work running / Review running / Ship / Spend 24h)

narrative.Action: Wire the MetricStrip primitive into PipelineView at 5 columns with these tiles per the mock: Active issues, Work running, Review running, Ship/Ready to merge, Spend (24h). Counts come from selectIssues + selectAgentList + reviewStatusByIssueId. Spend comes from cost_events rollup (already used by Board).

subItems.title: 5 tiles render in correct order with correct eyebrow icons and signal colors
Counts update reactively as store changes
Spend tile reuses the cost_events selector that powers Board today (no new endpoint)

items.title: Wire Pipeline phase grouping with sticky PhaseHeader (Ship · Review · Work · Plan · Todo)

narrative.Action: Group issues into 5 phase buckets per PRD §4.1. Render each group with PhaseHeader (sticky) followed by IssueRow children sorted by priority then updatedAt. Empty groups show '0 issues' in count chip; do not collapse. Phase classification reuses src/dashboard/frontend/src/lib/pipeline-state.ts.

subItems.title: Issues are correctly bucketed into Ship, Review, Work, Plan, Todo per pipeline-state.ts classifier
PhaseHeader sticks to top while scrolling within its group
Empty groups render their PhaseHeader with count '0' but do not show row area
Within each phase, rows sort by priority desc then updatedAt desc

items.title: Wire Pipeline cross-project filter (?phase=ship segment, project pills, blocked/no-pr modifiers)

narrative.Action: Add a filter row beneath the metric strip with: segmented `?phase=` control (Ship / Review / Work / Plan / Todo / All), per-project pills (multi-select), and modifier toggles (blocked, no-pr) — these three modifiers cover the legacy Awaiting Merge sub-views (selectAwaitingMerge, selectBlockedFromMerge, selectOpenMergeRequests). Filter state syncs to URL. Default state shows All phases.

subItems.title: Phase segmented control syncs to ?phase=<phase> URL parameter; clicking a segment scrolls to that PhaseHeader and filters
